notes: v364 — 🗑 DELETE tools to fix your portfolio by hand (customer copy). You wanted to clean up the mess yourself without losing your auto-pilot — so here are two deletes, and both act ONLY on your 👤 My Trading account (your 🤖 auto-pilot $50k is a separate account and is never touched). (1) 🗑 DELETE HOLDING: on any holding tap ⋯ → 🗑 Delete holding — it removes the position WITHOUT recording a sale and puts what you paid back into your cash. That's how you clear a wrong or corrupted holding (like that 1,150,000-share ADR) without banking a fake profit. (2) 🗑 DELETE a closed trade: on the 📜 History tab every row now has 🗑 Delete next to ↩ Undo — it removes a wrong or duplicate trade and reconciles your cash. Both keep your balance internally consistent. IMPORTANT: back up first (💾 Backup account to file) — deletes can't be undone. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v364.
